data.title: RIWI clarifies $2.5 million financing structure and hires capital markets adviser
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

RIWI Corp ( (TSE:RIWI) ) has issued an update.

RIWI Corp. has clarified the structure of its recently closed non-brokered private placement, confirming it issued 8,322,220 units at $0.30 each for a total value of $2,496,666. Of this, $2,024,970 represents gross cash proceeds from 6,749,900 units, while 1,572,320 units valued at $471,696 are now classified by the TSX Venture Exchange as shares issued in settlement of debt.

The company emphasized that no cash was received for the debt settlement portion and that the net cash raised will support working capital, product development and commercialization initiatives. Insiders participated in the debt settlement under related-party rules, but the company relied on exemptions as their involvement did not exceed 25% of its market capitalization, and it also engaged JT Pacific Capital Partners for a year-long capital markets advisory and investor relations mandate, compensating the firm with monthly fees and stock options subject to exchange approval.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:RIWI) stock is a Hold with a C$0.27 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on RIWI Corp stock, see the TSE:RIWI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RIWI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RIWI is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (ongoing losses, negative cash flow, and eroding equity). Technicals also reflect a bearish trend despite near-oversold signals. Offsetting these, recent corporate updates indicate stronger Q3 growth, cost actions, and early profitability progress (adjusted EBITDA), but not yet enough to overcome the broader financial pressures.

To see Spark’s full report on RIWI stock, click here.

More about RIWI Corp

RIWI Corp. is a Toronto-based market research platform and global trend-tracking and prediction technology firm. The company focuses on delivering data-driven insights to clients by monitoring worldwide opinion and behavioral trends, positioning itself within the broader market research and analytics industry.

Average Trading Volume: 18,004

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$5.61M

data.title: Nuvve Preferred Holders Waive Rights, Streamlining Capital Structure
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Nuvve Holding ( (NVVE) ) is now available.

On March 31, 2026, certain holders of Nuvve Holding Corp.’s Series A Convertible Preferred Stock agreed to waive their contractual right to receive Alternate Consideration in the event of a Fundamental Transaction, as defined in the security’s Certificate of Designation. The waiver simplifies the preferred stock’s terms in change-of-control or other qualifying transactions, potentially reducing complexity and costs for Nuvve in future strategic deals and affecting the risk-return profile of the affected preferred shareholders.

By removing a layer of protective consideration for some Series A preferred investors, the move could make Nuvve’s capital structure more straightforward and potentially more attractive to acquirers or financing partners evaluating corporate actions. The decision reflects a negotiated shift in rights between the company and these preferred holders, with implications for how value may be allocated among different classes of stakeholders in any future transformative transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (NVVE) stock is a Hold with a $0.63 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nuvve Holding stock, see the NVVE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NVVE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NVVE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large ongoing losses and sustained cash burn) and bearish technicals (price far below major moving averages with negative momentum). Earnings-call and corporate updates add some upside through the OMNIA pipeline, cost cuts, and improved liquidity, but near-term execution and funding risks remain significant, and valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on NVVE stock, click here.

More about Nuvve Holding

Nuvve Holding Corp. operates in the clean energy and electric vehicle infrastructure sector, focusing on vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technology that enables electric vehicles to interact with and support the power grid. The company’s business model typically centers on software platforms and services that aggregate EV batteries as distributed energy resources for utilities, fleet operators, and other energy market participants.

Average Trading Volume: 2,760,701

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.11M

data.title: New Era Energy Amends Shareholder Note for Equity Financing
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

New Era Energy & Digital ( (NUAI) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. issued a $5 million promissory note to significant shareholder Zachary Yi Zhou, with the transaction reviewed and approved by the company’s audit committee and board. On April 6, 2026, the company amended and restated the note to carry 5% annual interest, a 1.02x repayment premium at maturity, and an earliest maturity trigger tied to September 30, 2026, the closing of a TCDC Project credit facility, a qualified equity financing, or acceleration, with repayment to be made in common stock.

At maturity, the note will convert into common stock at a price based on either the public price in a qualified equity offering or the 30-day volume-weighted average price if no such financing occurs, and it may be prepaid in shares at any time. The structure deepens the company’s financing flexibility for its project portfolio, notably the TCDC Project, while further aligning a major shareholder with the company’s equity performance through mandatory stock conversion and equity-linked repayment terms.

More about New Era Energy & Digital

New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. operates in the broader energy and digital infrastructure space, focusing on projects such as the TCDC Project that appear linked to structured credit facilities and capital-intensive development. The company relies on equity and debt instruments, including convertible notes, to finance its operations and project pipeline while engaging major shareholders in funding arrangements.

Average Trading Volume: 4,770,335

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $247M

Learn more about NUAI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

Rbb Bancorp ( (RBB) ) has issued an update.

On April 1, 2026, RBB Bancorp announced that Dr. Christopher Lin, Ph.D., a current member of both the RBB Bancorp Board and the Royal Business Bank Board, will retire effective as of the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders and will not stand for re-election. He will also step down from the Board’s Audit Committee, Directors Loan Committee, and Community Reinvestment Act Committee at that time.

The company stated that Dr. Lin’s decision to retire did not result from any disagreement with management, the Board, or the bank’s board on matters related to operations, policies, or practices, suggesting an orderly board transition. His departure will require reallocation or replacement of his committee roles, but the absence of controversy indicates limited immediate governance or operational disruption for stakeholders.

Overall score reflects stable but not fully recovered financial performance (profits and ROE still well below prior-cycle peaks, and 2025 free cash flow declined), balanced by clearly attractive valuation (low P/E and ~3% yield) and a generally positive earnings outlook driven by improving credit trends and continued loan growth. data.description:

Mcchip Resources ( (TSE:MCS) ) just unveiled an update.

McChip Resources Inc. has declared a special one-time cash distribution and a one-time distribution of Taranis Resources Inc. shares to shareholders of record as of April 10, 2026, with payment on April 21, 2026. The board concluded that this structure, combining a return of capital and an eligible dividend, is in the company’s best interests and aligns with prior shareholder approval to reduce stated capital.

The cash payout totals about $6.56 million, or $1.10 per McChip share, of which $0.87 is a return of capital and $0.23 is an eligible dividend, while shareholders will also receive roughly 2.9156 Taranis shares per McChip share via a dividend-in-kind. Trading in McChip shares around the record and payment dates will follow TSX Venture Exchange due-bill procedures, ensuring buyers during the due-bill period receive the distributions and potentially affecting short-term trading dynamics for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MCS) stock is a Buy with a C$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mcchip Resources stock, see the TSE:MCS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MCS Stock

The score is held back primarily by weak and inconsistent financial performance—especially the 2025 disconnect between positive net income and sharply negative operating/free cash flow, alongside volatile revenues and operating losses. Technicals are moderately supportive with the stock above key moving averages and neutral momentum, but valuation is difficult to justify due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on MCS stock, click here.

data.title: Inogen Adds Director Amid Cooperation Agreement With Shareholder
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Inogen ( (INGN) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 6, 2026, Inogen announced that veteran medical device executive Vafa Jamali will join its board as an independent Class I director, effective at the 2026 annual meeting or June 15, 2026, whichever comes first, with a term running to the 2027 annual meeting. Jamali, a former ZimVie CEO and Medtronic respiratory division leader, will also serve on Inogen’s audit and compliance committees, and will receive standard director cash and equity compensation.

The company simultaneously disclosed a cooperation agreement with shareholder Kent Lake Partners and related parties, under which the investor group agreed to customary standstill and voting commitments through early 2027. The pact, which limits Kent Lake’s ownership stake and activist activities, signals a truce with an engaged shareholder as Inogen pursues its strategy to evolve from a single-product oxygen supplier into a diversified respiratory care platform with a stronger growth and profitability profile.

The most recent analyst rating on (INGN) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inogen stock, see the INGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on INGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INGN is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects a company in transition: earnings-call guidance and strategic progress (adjusted EBITDA inflection, cash/no debt, buyback, new products) are meaningful positives, but they are tempered by weak financial performance quality (ongoing losses and cash burn) and a neutral-to-weak technical picture. Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on INGN stock, click here.

More about Inogen

Inogen, Inc. is a global medical technology company focused on innovative respiratory products for use in the homecare setting, targeting patients with chronic respiratory conditions. The company develops, manufactures, and markets portable oxygen and other respiratory therapy devices, working with patients, prescribers, home medical equipment providers, and distributors to expand access to home-based respiratory care.

data.title: HeartCore Executes 1-for-20 Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. ( (HTCR) ).

On March 4, 2026, the board of HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. approved a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of the company’s issued and outstanding common stock, following prior stockholder authorization granted on June 30, 2025. The company then filed a certificate of amendment in Delaware, making the split effective at 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time on April 2, 2026, after which its shares began trading on a post-split basis on Nasdaq on April 6, 2026.

At the effective time, every 20 pre-split shares were automatically reclassified into one share, with fractional holdings rounded up to the nearest whole share, while the authorized share count and par value per share remained unchanged. The move significantly reduced the number of shares outstanding without altering overall authorized capital, a step typically aimed at boosting the per-share trading price and supporting continued Nasdaq listing status for existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HTCR) stock is a Hold with a $0.17 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. stock, see the HTCR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HTCR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HTCR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—especially sustained negative operating/free cash flow and a sharp 2025 revenue decline—along with bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation and recent positive corporate actions (buyback authorization and shareholder-friendly bylaw change) provide some support but are not enough to offset the core cash-generation and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on HTCR stock, click here.

data.title: DHI Group Secures New $70 Million Credit Facility
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

DHI Group ( (DHX) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 1, 2026, DHI Group, Inc. and certain subsidiaries entered into a new senior secured revolving credit facility with Bank of America and other lenders, providing aggregate commitments of $70 million, including $5 million sublimits each for letters of credit and swingline loans. The facility, guaranteed by key subsidiaries and secured by substantially all personal property of the borrowers and guarantors, matures on April 1, 2030 and can be prepaid without penalty, with an accordion feature allowing up to $37.5 million in additional term loans or increased commitments.

At closing, the company drew approximately $33 million under the new facility to fully repay and terminate all commitments under its prior credit agreement, effectively refinancing its existing indebtedness. The new structure enhances DHI Group’s financial flexibility for working capital and general corporate purposes while extending its debt maturity profile and diversifying its lender base.

The most recent analyst rating on (DHX) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DHI Group stock, see the DHX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DHX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DHX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by deteriorated profitability and revenue pressure in the financials, despite strong free cash flow. Offsetting factors include constructive technical momentum and a balanced earnings-call outlook with supportive cash flow and margin targets, though continued Dice weakness and reduced forward visibility limit upside.

To see Spark’s full report on DHX stock, click here.

More about DHI Group

DHI Group, Inc. is a technology-focused company operating through subsidiaries including Dice Inc., Dice Career Solutions, Inc., ClearanceJobs, LLC and Point Solutions Group, LLC. The group provides career and recruitment services, with a focus on specialized job platforms and related solutions for employers and professionals in targeted markets.
